name: Bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth.

name: Ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large it appears to lose the ability to stand.

name: Venusaur
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Charmeleon
description: When it swings its burning tail it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.

name: Charizard
description: Spits fire hot enough to melt boulders.

name: Squirtle
description: After birth its back swells and hardens into a shell.

name: Wartortle
description: Often hides in water to stalk prey.

name: Blastoise
description: A brutal Pokemon with pressurized water jets on its shell.
